channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress near the school car park, 3rd March
item.description:
This mattress has been here for a couple of days now. Someone keeps flytipping by the school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non-electric bike abandoned outside Beckenham Court, 2 The Avenue, Beckenham, 3rd March
item.description:
A non-electric bike has been abandoned against a wall in front of Beckenham Court, 2 The Avenue, Beckenham. The back tyre appears to have a puncture. Please can it be removed and reunited with its owner? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agent board, 3rd March
item.description:
Estate agent board

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hargwyne Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes in the middle of the road, 3rd March
item.description:
A few deep potholes in Ash Grove N13

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ash Grove, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White pole, 3rd March
item.description:
White pole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nealden Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish accumulating, 3rd March
item.description:
General rubbish accumulating in the area where you park, poor visibility at night so end up treading in it all getting in & out of car, been building up for at least two months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walsingham Walk, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clusters of potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
3 large clusters of potholes-ditch like
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1051, High Road, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Loads of shoes and a piece of furniture dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vandyke Cross, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post has fallen out of the ground, 3rd March
item.description:
The post has come out of the ground outside 109 college road - it needs to be replaced

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing and encouraging flytipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Bin overflowing and encouraging flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting sticker, 3rd March
item.description:
Remove the xenophobic racist sticker

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Berylson Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil seeping onto pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
There is oil seeping onto pavement from one of the cars on the front of 12 ash grove se20 the oil is being spread and when it is wet the pavement is treacherous to walk on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes main road, 3rd March
item.description:
Potholes on main road sidcup between junction of Christchurch road and updale road. Biggest ones in middle of road where fire station is and right by updale road (in the middle of road) Causing damage to cars and cars swerving to avoid them. Dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12" pothole 4" deep outside The Anchor, 3rd March
item.description:
12" pothole 4" deep outside The Anchor. Really deep. Really sharp. The main issue is traffic coming from Bexley towards The Anchor are pushed wide by permanently parked cars. I have seen several cars heading towards Bexley, swerve at the last second, into the path of an approaching car or bus. The proximity to the junction and the bus stop is causing real safety issues, not just the hole itself.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridgen Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 3rd March
item.description:
This vehicle is blocking a driveway for past 3 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on road entrance to 373 Old Farm Avenue. DA158AA. ld, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole has been getting wider and deeper over past month causing damage to car wheels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 338, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitis on window frames, 3rd March
item.description:
There are still some white graffitis on black window frames (1 on hoxton square side, 2 on coronet street side) on ground level.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 3rd March

Illegal parking GL73 AFV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Maidstone Road, Southgate

item.title: Blocking view, 3rd March
item.description:
This van is parked infrount house no 91 and 93 since nearly two months , I am having deficulty taking my car from driveway blocking view .

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food and rubbish under street light, 3rd March
item.description:
Some people has dumped rubbish on pavement in corner of Salisbury Close Se17 1ny

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-28, Salisbury Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
